title: Front Office Manager - Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates:
Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates!
